name: Toragi Kayo

appearance.hair: Half yellow, half red — split down the middle. Natural. Nobody asks about it anymore.
appearance.build: Tall and solidly muscular. Presence in a room before he speaks.
appearance.other: Moves carefully. He's broken things by accident before — tables, doorknobs, once a sink — and that's made him deliberate about it. His strikes look controlled because they have to be.

personality.summary: Intimidating exterior, genuinely awkward interior. He looks like the class's most dangerous fighter and he is, but he's also the person most likely to apologise for interrupting you and then stand there unsure whether to leave. He has a hard time starting conversations. He has no trouble finishing a fight.
personality.in_class: Quiet, attentive. Sits near the back. Takes good notes in small careful handwriting.
personality.in_combat: Different person. Not aggressive — precise. He knows what his quirk does and he uses it deliberately. The intimidating part isn't the look on his face. It's the fact that he can hit the same spot twice.
personality.quirk_of_character: He prepares small gifts sometimes — nothing elaborate, just food or a pencil or something useful — and then cannot figure out how to give them. Yoshibara once found three of these things on her desk with no note.

ability_scores.note: DEX primary (Twin Impact requires extreme precision — hitting the same exact point twice in sequence demands fine motor control beyond raw strength). CON secondary for sustained engagement.

class_note: Heroic Vanguard → Reckless Attacker Style. Impact Echo's repeat-damage and bounce mechanic synergises with the subclass's high-risk, high-reward approach.

quirk_mechanics.weakness: Overuse risks injury — after using Impact Echo a number of times equal to his level times his proficiency bonus in a day, he must succeed on a DC 14 CON save or take 1d12 true damage.

abilities.name: Impact Echo
abilities.type: Bonus Action or Reaction (uses per turn = proficiency bonus)
abilities.description: When Toragi hits a target with a melee or ranged attack, create a second impact at the same location dealing the same damage again. For ranged attacks, a missed shot that strikes a surface can bounce per a directional chart (forward, right, backward, or left), extending its effective range up to 4x normal and letting him choose a new creature in the new line to make a separate attack roll against.

dm_notes.combat_role: High single-target burst damage via repeated impacts. Impact Echo turns a single good hit into double damage, and missed ranged shots can bounce off terrain into a second target. If his hits land, he's devastating. If they don't, he's not doing much that round.
dm_notes.social_role: Unexpected emotional anchor. When something happens to the class — a bad training result, a fight between classmates, real danger — Toragi doesn't have the words, but he shows up. People feel it.
dm_notes.growth_arc: Learning that being intimidating isn't the problem; assuming everyone else is afraid of him is. A classmate who isn't afraid of him and genuinely enjoys his company changes how he sees himself.
dm_notes.weakness_to_exploit: His quirk relies on landing the initial hit before the echo applies — enemies with high AC or evasion deny him the follow-up entirely. Heavy use in a single day risks a CON save and true damage. His CHA is low — in social-heavy scenes he's at a disadvantage.
